task: Write a Python function that parses an AWS S3 bucket name from an S3 URI string in the format 's3://bucket-name/key/path' and returns just the bucket name.
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows read-only access to all objects in an S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that validates an AWS Access Key ID format, which starts with 'AKIA' followed by exactly 16 alphanumeric characters (uppercase letters and numbers only).
